chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1678 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case. 27.05.2025 Mr.Irfan Shaikh, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General. M/s.Sardar Zafar Hussain & Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, Advocates for Respondent. Mr.Naveed Elahi, Collector Customs Appraisement (East) Karachi is present. Compliance report filed by respondent No.2 is taken on record. In view thereof the petition appears to have served its purpose is disposed of accordingly. The presence of learned officer is appreciated and dispensed with. Judge Judge nasir
